OpenTelemark.name: Open Telemark
OpenTelemark.preceding_figure_names: Closed Change RF, Closed Wing, Double Reverse Spin, Fallaway Reverse And Slip Pivot, Hesitation Change, Reverse Pivot, Reverse Turn, Wing
OpenTelemark.following_figure_names: Chasse From Promenade Position, Weave From Promenade Position, Cross Hesitation, Wing, Left Whisk
OpenTelemark.notes: Cross Hesitation can be used from other positions and can be overturned. If overturned, RF position will be "fwd and across". There is no foot swivel on step 4 unless cross hesitation is overturned. Normal ending is stepping back with Lady outside.

steps.action: fwd DC HT start to turn L

comments: Man roll on the lady, turning without the Lady. Shaping to L (his R shoulder up)

steps.action: to side and slightly fwd in PP Pointing DW body facing wall
back BDC TH start to turn L
comments: Straight back, do use CBM, but do not veer to right which will cut in front of Man. When doing CBM, it really just makes body neutral, do not over do CBM, which will pull Man. Rotate through the hip, changing sway angle through the upper body (upward leftward diagonal), connect the R shoulder and R hip down. anchor, pull in center.
Anchor, pull in center. Let base rotate. Do not cross center of Man. Heel turn, close feet slowly

steps.action: diag fwd in PP R side leading Pointing LOD
comments: Completing the Telemark with body turning to PP.

Cross Hesitation.name: Cross Hesitation
Cross Hesitation.preceding_figure_names: Back Whisk, Basic Weave, Contra Check, Fallaway Whisk, Open Impetus, Open Telemark, Outside Change, Turning Lock, Turning Lock to R, Weave From Promenade Position, Whisk
Cross Hesitation.following_figure_names: Natural Turn (4-6), Outside Change, Fallaway Whisk, Back Whisk, Closed Impetus (when turned to L to back DW), Back Lock, Outside Spin
Cross Hesitation.notes: Cross Hesitation can be used from other positions and can be overturned. If overturned, RF position will be "fwd and across". There is no foot swivel on step 4 unless cross hesitation is overturned. Normal ending is stepping back with Lady outside.

steps.action: fwd and across in PP and CBMP
